title: Pyre-Smoked Mediterranean Lamb Casserole
description: Charred, juicy, hangover-cure Mediterranean dish featuring white wine vinegar and a flambe finish.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C) and heat a grill or grill pan to medium-high.
Season the lamb with salt, black pepper, and oregano.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, white wine vinegar, and garlic.
Add the sliced onion and red bell pepper to the bowl and toss to coat.
Place the lamb on a baking sheet or grill and cook for 10 minutes on each side, or until browned and charred.
Transfer the lamb to a cutting board and let rest for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, broil the red bell pepper for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until charred and blistered.
Slice the lamb and layer it in a baking dish with the cooked vegetables and feta cheese.
Drizzle the sauce from the grill over the lamb and top with kalamata olives.
Return the baking dish to the oven and cook for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the dish from the oven and sprinkle with fresh oregano.
